channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Trump snubs housing bill to pressure GOP
item.description: President Trump is refusing to sign a bipartisan housing bill to protest Senate Republicans' failure to pass an unrelated bill that would tight...

item.title: Outsiders with strong expertise to lead Fed task forces
item.description: Federal Reserve Chairman Kevin Warsh has formed five task forces to revamp the central bank's policy process, likely bringing in external perspectives.

item.title: Inside Mike Johnson's cycle of repeated failed rule votes
item.description: Speaker Mike Johnson will again face a group of Republicans willing to block House floor proceedings, repeating last week's challenge.

item.title: Trump says Iran talks will continue, but ceasefire is over
item.description: President Trump said Friday the U.S. will continue talks with Iran but will no longer adhere to the ceasefire, marking a significant shift.
